targets.queryText:
WITH bounds AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(CAST(strftime('%s', NULLIF('${ts_start}','')) AS INTEGER) * 1000000000, (SELECT MIN(timestamp_ns) FROM metric_data_points)) AS t_start,
    COALESCE(CAST(strftime('%s', NULLIF('${ts_end}','')) AS INTEGER) * 1000000000, (SELECT MAX(timestamp_ns) FROM metric_data_points)) AS t_end
),
params AS (
  SELECT t_start, t_end,
    CASE WHEN ${max_points} > 0 THEN MAX(1, (t_end - t_start) / ${max_points}) ELSE 1 END AS bucket
  FROM bounds
),
stat_names(type_id, stat_id, stat_name) AS (VALUES

  (26,1,'Bytes'),

  (26,3,'WatermarkBytes'),

  (26,6,'XoffRoomCurrOccupancyBytes'),
  (26,7,'XoffRoomWatermarkBytes'),
  (26,8,'DroppedPackets'),

  (26,10,'WatermarkCells'),

  (26,12,'SharedWatermarkCells'),
  (26,13,'XoffRoomCurrOccupancyCells'),
  (26,14,'XoffRoomWatermarkCells')),
type_names(type_id, type_name) AS (VALUES
  (1,'Port'),(21,'Queue'),(24,'BufPool'),(26,'IngressPG')
),
grouped AS (
  SELECT (m.timestamp_ns / p.bucket) * p.bucket / 1000000000 AS time,
         AVG(m.value_int) AS value,
         json_extract(m.dp_attrs, '$.object_name') AS obj,
         CAST(json_extract(m.dp_attrs, '$.sai_type_id') AS INTEGER) AS tid,
         CAST(json_extract(m.dp_attrs, '$.sai_stat_id') AS INTEGER) AS sid
  FROM metric_data_points m, params p
  WHERE m.timestamp_ns BETWEEN p.t_start AND p.t_end
    AND json_extract(m.dp_attrs, '$.object_name') IN (${object_name:sqlstring})
    AND json_extract(m.dp_attrs, '$.sai_type_id') IN (${sai_type_id:sqlstring})
    AND json_extract(m.dp_attrs, '$.sai_stat_id') IN (${sai_stat_id:sqlstring})
  GROUP BY (m.timestamp_ns / p.bucket), obj, tid, sid
  ORDER BY time
)
SELECT g.time, g.value,
       g.obj || '_' ||
       COALESCE(tn.type_name, 'T' || g.tid) || '_' ||
       COALESCE(sn.stat_name, 'stat' || g.sid) AS series
FROM grouped g
LEFT JOIN type_names tn ON g.tid = tn.type_id
LEFT JOIN stat_names sn ON g.tid = sn.type_id AND g.sid = sn.stat_id

type_names(type_id, type_name) AS (VALUES
  (1,'Port'),(21,'Queue'),(24,'BufPool'),(26,'IngressPG')
),
grouped AS (
  SELECT (m.timestamp_ns / p.bucket) * p.bucket / 1000000000 AS time,
         AVG(m.value_int) AS value,
         json_extract(m.dp_attrs, '$.object_name') AS obj,
         CAST(json_extract(m.dp_attrs, '$.sai_type_id') AS INTEGER) AS tid,
         CAST(json_extract(m.dp_attrs, '$.sai_stat_id') AS INTEGER) AS sid
  FROM metric_data_points m, params p
  WHERE m.timestamp_ns BETWEEN p.t_start AND p.t_end
    AND json_extract(m.dp_attrs, '$.object_name') IN (${object_name:sqlstring})
    AND json_extract(m.dp_attrs, '$.sai_type_id') IN (${sai_type_id:sqlstring})
    AND json_extract(m.dp_attrs, '$.sai_stat_id') IN (${sai_stat_id:sqlstring})
  GROUP BY (m.timestamp_ns / p.bucket), obj, tid, sid
  ORDER BY time
)
SELECT g.time, g.value,
       g.obj || '_' ||
       COALESCE(tn.type_name, 'T' || g.tid) || '_' ||
       COALESCE(sn.stat_name, 'stat' || g.sid) AS series
FROM grouped g
LEFT JOIN type_names tn ON g.tid = tn.type_id
LEFT JOIN stat_names sn ON g.tid = sn.type_id AND g.sid = sn.stat_id

list.description: Max data points (0 = all, may be slow for large datasets)
list.label: Max Points
list.name: max_points

list.label: Object Name
list.name: object_name
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT json_extract(dp_attrs, '$.object_name') AS __text FROM metric_data_points ORDER BY __text

list.label: SAI Type
list.name: sai_type_id
list.query:
SELECT json_extract(dp_attrs, '$.sai_type_id') AS __value,
       CASE CAST(json_extract(dp_attrs, '$.sai_type_id') AS INTEGER)
         WHEN 1 THEN 'Port'
         WHEN 21 THEN 'Queue'
         WHEN 24 THEN 'BufferPool'
         WHEN 26 THEN 'IngressPriorityGroup'
         ELSE 'Type' || json_extract(dp_attrs, '$.sai_type_id')
       END AS __text
FROM metric_data_points
GROUP BY __value
ORDER BY CAST(__value AS INTEGER)

SELECT CAST(m.stat_id AS TEXT) AS __value,
       COALESCE(sn.stat_name, 'stat' || m.stat_id) || ' (' || m.stat_id || ')' AS __text
FROM (SELECT DISTINCT CAST(json_extract(dp_attrs, '$.sai_stat_id') AS INTEGER) AS stat_id,
             CAST(json_extract(dp_attrs, '$.sai_type_id') AS INTEGER) AS type_id
      FROM metric_data_points) m
LEFT JOIN sn ON m.type_id = sn.type_id AND m.stat_id = sn.stat_id
ORDER BY m.stat_id
